entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated groundnut, specifically Arachis hypogaea, used in regeneration studies

entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: The genus containing both wild species and cultivated groundnut

entities.name: REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of renewing seed accessions for continued conservation and utilization

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The preservation of diverse crop germplasm accessions

entities.name: UTILIZATION
entities.description: The use of germplasm for crop improvement

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility where special regeneration facilities were created

entities.name: SEEDLING ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The successful emergence and early growth of seedlings during regeneration

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The overall development and growth of the plant during regeneration

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The amount of pods produced per cycle during regeneration

entities.name: ADAPTATION PROBLEMS
entities.description: Difficulties faced by wild relatives that hinder regeneration

entities.name: SEASONAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Environmental limitations based on the time of year that hinder regeneration

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs that utilize diverse germplasm to improve crop traits
